completed.descriptionHtml: A job in a workflow run finished. This event occurs when a job in a workflow is completed, regardless of whether the job was successful or unsuccessful.
completed.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity relating to a job in a GitHub Actions workflow. For more information, see "Using jobs in a workflow." For information about the API to manage workflow jobs, see "Workflow jobs" in the REST API documentation.

For activity relating to a workflow run instead of a job in a workflow run, use the workflow_run event.

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Actions" repository permission.

bodyParameters.name: enterprise
bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

bodyParameters.name: installation
bodyParameters.description: The GitHub App installation. Webhook payloads contain the installation property when the event is configured for and sent to a GitHub App. For more information, see "Using webhooks with GitHub Apps."

bodyParameters.name: organization
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub organization. Webhook payloads contain the organization property when the webhook is configured for an organization, or when the event occurs from activity in a repository owned by an organization.

bodyParameters.name: repository
bodyParameters.description: The repository on GitHub where the event occurred. Webhook payloads contain the repository property when the event occurs from activity in a repository.

bodyParameters.name: sender
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub user.

childParamsGroups.name: created_at
childParamsGroups.description: The time that the job created.

childParamsGroups.name: labels
childParamsGroups.description: Custom labels for the job. Specified by the "runs-on" attribute in the workflow YAML.

childParamsGroups.name: runner_group_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the runner group that is running this job. This will be null as long as workflow_job[status] is queued.

childParamsGroups.name: runner_group_name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the runner group that is running this job. This will be null as long as workflow_job[status] is queued.

childParamsGroups.name: runner_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the runner that is running this job. This will be null as long as workflow_job[status] is queued.

childParamsGroups.name: runner_name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the runner that is running this job. This will be null as long as workflow_job[status] is queued.

childParamsGroups.name: status
childParamsGroups.description: The current status of the job. Can be queued, in_progress, waiting, or completed.

childParamsGroups.name: head_branch
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the current branch.

childParamsGroups.name: workflow_name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the workflow.

bodyParameters.name: deployment
bodyParameters.description: A request for a specific ref(branch,sha,tag) to be deployed

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the deployment

childParamsGroups.name: ref
childParamsGroups.description: The ref to deploy. This can be a branch, tag, or sha.

childParamsGroups.name: task
childParamsGroups.description: Parameter to specify a task to execute

childParamsGroups.name: environment
childParamsGroups.description: Name for the target deployment environment.

childParamsGroups.name: creator
childParamsGroups.description: A GitHub user.

childParamsGroups.name: transient_environment
childParamsGroups.description: Specifies if the given environment is will no longer exist at some point in the future. Default: false.

childParamsGroups.name: production_environment
childParamsGroups.description: Specifies if the given environment is one that end-users directly interact with. Default: false.

in_progress.descriptionHtml: A job in a workflow run started processing on a runner.
in_progress.summaryHtml:
